name: meta-skill
description: Create, evaluate, and improve reusable skills with a shared meta-skill CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Create, evaluate, and improve reusable skills.
interface.longDescription: Meta Skill bundles skill-create, skill-eval, and skill-improve with a shared meta-skill CLI for scaffolding, validation, local eval runs, and bounded improvement loops.
defaultPrompt: Create a reusable skill for this workflow.
Evaluate this skill with local prompts.
Plan a bounded improvement from eval evidence.
